💡 The 5-Day 'Slow Travel' Logic

Lesvos is huge. To enjoy it, we suggest splitting your stay: 2 nights in the North (Molyvos) and 2 nights in the West (Skala Eressos).

📅 PRO ITINERARY (Total ~310 km)

Day 1: Mytilene Arrival. Collect car at the airport. Explore the neoclassical mansions and the Ottoman old town.
Day 2: The Medieval North. Drive to Molyvos. Explore the castle, the stone-paved alleys, and the Eftalou hot springs.
Day 3: The Wild West. Journey to Sigri to see the Petrified Forest (UNESCO), then head to Skala Eressos to check into your next base.
Day 4: Eressos Chill. A 'car-free' day. Enjoy the bohemian wooden platforms of Eressos and the best sunset in the Aegean.
Day 5: Wetlands & Spirit. Drive back via Kalloni (Flamingos) and the mountain village of Agiassos, finishing with an Ouzo tour in Plomari.

⚠️ Blunt Driver's Advice

  • Don't underestimate the size; crossing the island takes 2+ hours.
  • The roads are winding; avoid driving at night due to livestock on the road.
